interpretation: Clean data is useful, but a zero-missing operational file is a synthetic-data signal.

interpretation: Real delivery duration usually has richer minute-level variation.
This is useful for dinner-peak staffing but too clean for full-day demand modeling.

Sequential ids are acceptable, but they reinforce the generated-data reading.
Order timestamps progress with repeated gaps rather than a natural arrival process.
The 2024 series starts on Jan 5; without business context, do not infer a New Year effect.
